title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 58.
content:
There was an Old Lady whose folly,
    Induced her to sit in a holly;
    Whereon by a thorn,
    Her dress being torn,
    She quickly became melancholy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 58."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
